description:
Offered: every other year
The course includes U.S. and foreign area studies. Students conduct regional and systematic analysis based upon geographic elements influencing domestic evolution and international relations.
Prerequisite(s): AMST 1800 or GEOG 1000 or GEOG 1100 or HIST 1400 or HIST 1500 or HIST 2201 or IDIS 1200 or IDIS 1800
Meets General Education Requirement(s): DP
prerequisites: AMST 1800 or GEOG 1000 or GEOG 1100 or HIST 1400 or HIST 1500 or HIST 2201 or IDIS 1200 or IDIS 1800
